scripts.build:wasm: RUSTC=$(rustup which --toolchain stable rustc) rustup run stable cargo build --manifest-path ../Cargo.toml -p pdl-wasm --lib --target wasm32-unknown-unknown --release && mkdir -p public/wasm && cp ../target/wasm32-unknown-unknown/release/pdl_wasm.wasm public/wasm/pdl.wasm
scripts.build: npm run build:wasm && npm run check && vite build && npm run build:pages-fallback
